from pydantic import BaseModel


class UserRecord(BaseModel):
    name: str
    email: str
    age: int


def process_users(raw_users: list[UserRecord]) -> list[dict]:
    results = []
    for model in raw_users:
        results.append({"name": model.name, "email": model.email, "age": model.age})
    return results


def transform_batch(records: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    validated = [UserRecord(**r) for r in records]
    return [v.model_dump() for v in validated]
